chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 21 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.129/2025 (C/A) 13-10-2025 Petitioner, namely Qurban Ali Mahar present in person Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Inspector Rizwan Ahmed Narejo, SHO Sarhad and ASI Ayaz Ali Mirbahar of PS Adilpur >>>>>..<<<<< Statement has been filed by the then SHO Adilpur at present posted as SHO Police Station, Sarhad, which is taken on record. Petitioner present in person alleges that he has serious threats being issued to him by ASI Zahid Ali Panhiyar posted at Police Station, Adilpur. Under the circumstances, SHO Police Station Adilpur is directed to act strictly in accordance with the law and also provide protection to the Petitioner as and when required. In case of failure, action will be taken against the SHO Police Station, Adilpur. The listed Contempt Application is disposed of in the above terms. Judge ARBROHI/PS
